purpose: Stable identity independent of interpretation.
validation_rule: Unique nonempty identifier.

purpose: Branch ancestry continuation split or merge.
validation_rule: Every parent exists or is NONE.

purpose: Stage that produced the record.
validation_rule: Must exist in FUTURE_ATLAS_PROTOCOL.tsv.

purpose: Configuration constrained dynamics global frozen or comparison.
validation_rule: Must agree with stage and graph node.

purpose: Metric-only metric-plus-phi coframe projector multiplier two-stage or connection census.
validation_rule: Must exist in OFFSHELL_CONFIGURATION_BRANCHES.tsv.

purpose: NONE or exact authorized law manifest.
validation_rule: NONE required for kinematic records; conditional status explicit otherwise.

purpose: OPEN CONDITIONAL UNIQUE_CONDITIONAL or NATIVE_IF_LATER_DERIVED.
validation_rule: May never be silently upgraded.

purpose: Coframe metric chart and supplied 2+2 realization.
validation_rule: Invertibility domain and alternate/type-change handling recorded.

purpose: Local/global coordinates and patch identifier.
validation_rule: Axes singularities and overlap maps recorded.

purpose: Coordinate frame connection and common-scale choices.
validation_rule: Every condition cites numeric necessity or physical premise.

purpose: All varied degrees and coordinate dependencies.
validation_rule: Must list every relevant metric slot or cite whole evaluator.

purpose: Visible completeness debt.
validation_rule: Use NONE or explicit premise-stamped list; never blank.

purpose: Which of x0 x1 y2 y3 remain live.
validation_rule: Static and symmetry reductions explicit.

purpose: Static stationary homogeneous axisymmetric or none.
validation_rule: Every symmetry is CHOSE unless cited otherwise.

purpose: Intervals patches cover caps quotient and finite-cell relation.
validation_rule: No implicit spatial infinity or box=physical-cell inference.

purpose: Allowed variations values normal jets and natural residuals.
validation_rule: Static phi seal separated from all other data.

purpose: All integration constants functions seeds and ranges.
validation_rule: Every physical value has a premise stamp.

purpose: Scanned parameters and direction.
validation_rule: Full preregistered domain or unresolved cells listed.

purpose: Exact symbolic shooting collocation continuation PDE method or NONE.
validation_rule: Category-A method and soundness checks recorded.

purpose: Discretization and arithmetic.
validation_rule: Exact values or NOT_APPLICABLE; refinement path present.

purpose: Raw residual tolerance iterations wall time and resource bounds.
validation_rule: Preregistered and not retuned after outcome.

purpose: Primary certification gate.
validation_rule: Unscaled norm and location recorded; never replaced by preconditioned residual.

purpose: All secondary equations and patch joins.
validation_rule: Each component/channel independently reported.

purpose: Numerical reliability and singularity diagnostics.
validation_rule: Report values or NOT_AVAILABLE with reason.

purpose: Grid/order/method consistency.
validation_rule: At least registered convergence plan and independent anchor.

purpose: Geometry classification rather than filtering.
validation_rule: Every type-change or undefined locus preserved.

purpose: Coordinate/frame-independent comparison fields.
validation_rule: Definitions and representative dependence explicit.

purpose: Multi-label mathematical behavior.
validation_rule: Vocabulary must include all applicable outcomes; no merit label.

purpose: CONVERGED DIVERGED FLOORED TIMEOUT BUG SUSPECT UNRESOLVED or NOT_RUN.
validation_rule: Disposition is not physics and does not delete record.

purpose: Complete dependency stamp.
validation_rule: Every id exists in PREMISE_AND_REDUCTION_LEDGER.tsv.

purpose: Reproducible evidence.
validation_rule: Existing paths hashes commands versions and shapes recorded.

purpose: Whether downstream data have been loaded.
validation_rule: UNSEEN before P12; readout role after P12 only.

purpose: OBSERVED INFERRED CONDITIONAL OPEN or comparison-only.
validation_rule: No canon or derived label beyond evidence gates.

purpose: Exact space not covered.
validation_rule: Nonempty even for successful bounded records.
